content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.codebase_indexer
FILE: cosmos/memory/codebase_indexer.py (684 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Codebase Indexer - AST-Based Memory Population

Extracts structured data from every .py file using AST parsing and stores
it across the 7-layer memory system (archival, knowledge graph, virtual
context, episodic). This gives agents deep codebase awareness when planning
or implementing tasks.


CLASSES:
- FunctionInfo
- ClassInfo
- ModuleInfo
- ASTExtractor: Extracts structured module information from Python source files via AST.
  Methods: def extract_module(self, filepath: str, project_root: str) -> Optional[ModuleInfo]
- CodebaseIndexer: Indexes the Cosmos codebase into the 7-layer memory system.

Uses AST parsing to
  Methods: async def index_codebase(self, memory_system=None, force: bool=False) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def start_background_indexing(self)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_codebase_indexer() -> CodebaseIndexer
- async def index_codebase_into_memory() -> Dict
